inputs.label: Base Pack Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of backpack and essential gear (excluding consumables and extra clothing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of backpack and essential gear (excluding consumables and extra clothing).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sırt çantası ve temel ekipman ağırlığı (sarf malzemeleri ve ekstra giysi hariç).

inputs.label: Food Weight per Day
inputs.businessContext: Estimated weight of food consumed per person per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated weight of food consumed per person per day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başı günlük tahmini tüketilen yiyecek ağırlığı.

inputs.label: Water Weight per Day
inputs.businessContext: Weight of water carried per day (1 liter = 1 kg).

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of water carried per day (1 liter = 1 kg).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük taşınan su ağırlığı (1 litre = 1 kg).

inputs.label: Fuel Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of fuel (e.g., gas canister).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of fuel (e.g., gas canister).

inputs.label: Extra Clothing Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of extra clothing and layers beyond base clothing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of extra clothing and layers beyond base clothing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel giysi dışındaki ekstra giysi ve katmanların ağırlığı.

inputs.label: Trip Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of days for the backpacking trip.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days for the backpacking trip.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sırt çantasıyla kamp gezisi için gün sayısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
